title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das argues that most AI agents are unreliable and the industry has normalized this failure. He claims that even 90% per-step accuracy compounds into total failure over 10-50 step workflows, and advocates for building agents with genuine reliability rather than shipping broken demos. Das emphasizes that taste, dogfooding, and proof of work matter more than raw LLM performance.
